headline: Palantir At 80x Earnings: What Revenue Growth Rate Justifies The Valuation?
summary: AI software titan Palantir (PLTR) trades at 112x 2026 earnings and 80x 2027 earnings. Multiples like that tend to end one of two ways: the company grows into them, or the market eventually forces a reckoning.
